# Core modules (mandatory)
jupyterlite-core==0.7.6
jupyterlab>=4.5.7,<4.6

# Python kernel (optional)
jupyterlite-pyodide-kernel==0.7.2

# Language support (optional)
jupyterlab-language-pack-fr-FR
jupyterlab-language-pack-zh-CN

# JupyterLab: dark theme
jupyterlab-night

# Python: ipywidget library for Jupyter notebooks (optional)
ipywidgets>=8.1.1,<9
# Python: ipyevents library for Jupyter notebooks (optional)
ipyevents>=2.0.1
# Python: interative Matplotlib library for Jupyter notebooks (optional)
ipympl>=0.9
# Python: ipycanvas library for Jupyter notebooks (optional)
ipycanvas>=0.13
# Python: ipyleaflet library for Jupyter notebooks (optional)
ipyleaflet

# Python: plotting libraries (optional)
plotly>=6
bqplot
https://github.com/Exabyte-io/mat3ra-jupyterlite-extension-data-bridge/releases/download/2025.7.29-0-rc-0/data_bridge-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl
